description: Extract navigational data (Date/Time, Weather/Visibility, Own Ship Name, Position, Heading, Speed, and Traffic Count) from all scenario directories in /opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/. Convert initial positions from Decimal Degrees to Degrees and Decimal Minutes (DDM) and calculate total planned voyage distance in Nautical Miles using the Haversine formula for scenarios with waypoints. Generate a deck log at /home/ga/Documents/deck_log.txt, sorted alphabetically by scenario name, using the format: 'Entry No: X', 'Scenario: [Name]', 'Position: [DDM]', 'Planned Distance: [X] nm'. Generate a voyage statistics summary at /home/ga/Documents/voyage_statistics.txt containing a summary table and aggregate statistics for Mean Speed, Max Beaufort, Total Traffic, and Total Waypoint Distance. This is a data processing task; the simulator GUI is not required.
